title: Lilium
description: An assortment of blocks and items that I felt like adding.
body:
An assortment of various blocks, items, and other miscellaneous paraphernalia I thought might be nice to add.

Contains, for example:
  - Cloth blocks from Minecraft Classic
  - Grass, cobblestone, sand, and gravel from Alpha
  - A (non-functioning, yet) Nether Reactor
  - The wood from [Ancient Trees](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ancient-trees)
